title: Fix stack VLA usage (P3 codereview)
description: Replace or bound all variable length arrays on stack flagged in codereview for stack safety on constrained devices. Fix completely across embedded and test code. Use beads tagged codereview for findings.
close_reason: Replaced stack VLAs with static buffers + BUILD_ASSERT(size <= MAX) + length checks returning errors in coap, app_interface, rpl. 3 passes found/fixed all similar.
